adapter_name.title: Name
adapter_name.description: Provide a unique name for this adapter instance. Example: Bedrock-Embedding-1

model.title: Model
model.description: Model name. Refer to [Bedrock's documentation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/models-supported.html) for the list of available models.

region_name.title: AWS Region name
region_name.description: Provide the AWS Region name where the service is running. Eg. us-east-1

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: The maximum number of times to retry a request if it fails.

auth_type.title: Authentication Type
enumNames: IAM Role / Instance Profile (on-prem AWS only)
auth_type.description: Choose **Access Keys** for any deployment (provide your AWS Access Key ID and Secret). Choose **IAM Role / Instance Profile** only when Unstract is hosted on AWS infrastructure that already has ambient credentials — for example EKS pods with IRSA, ECS tasks with a task role, or EC2 instances with an instance profile. Choose **Bedrock API Key (Bearer Token)** to authenticate with an AWS Bedrock API key (`AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK`). The token is region-scoped — ensure the AWS Region below matches the key's region.

aws_access_key_id.title: AWS Access Key ID
aws_access_key_id.description: Provide your AWS Access Key ID.

aws_secret_access_key.title: AWS Secret Access Key
aws_secret_access_key.description: Provide your AWS Secret Access Key.

aws_bearer_token.title: Bedrock API Key
aws_bearer_token.description: Paste the Bedrock API key (bearer token) issued for your AWS account. See AWS docs on `AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK`.
